callGraph.callee:
sel
        .attr("d", ({ points }: DagLink) => line(points))
        .attr("fill", "none")
        .attr("stroke-width", (d) =>
          isSelected(d.source) || isSelected(d.target) ? 2 : 1
        )
        .attr

sel
        .text((d) => d.data.name)
        .attr("x", svgWidth - MARGIN_X)
        .attr("font-family", "inherit")
        .attr("text-anchor", "end")
        .attr("alignment-baseline", "middle")
        .attr("y", (d) => d.y!)
        .attr("fill", (d) =>
          isSelected(d) ? theme.colors.black["500"] : theme.colors.gray["500"]
        )
        .attr

sel
        .attr("x", STROKE_WIDTH)
        .attr(
          "height",
          nodeRadius * 2 + edgeRadius * 2 - MARGIN_Y * 2 - STROKE_WIDTH * 2
        )
        .attr("width", svgWidth - STROKE_WIDTH * 2)
        .attr(
          "y",
          (d) => d.y! - nodeRadius - edgeRadius + MARGIN_Y + STROKE_WIDTH
        )
        .attr("rx", 5)
        .attr("fill", theme.colors.gray["500"])
        .attr("opacity", 0)
        .style

sel
        .attr("x", STROKE_WIDTH)
        .attr(
          "height",
          nodeRadius * 2 + edgeRadius * 2 - MARGIN_Y * 2 - STROKE_WIDTH * 2
        )
        .attr("width", svgWidth - STROKE_WIDTH * 2)
        .attr(
          "y",
          (d) => d.y! - nodeRadius - edgeRadius + MARGIN_Y + STROKE_WIDTH
        )
        .attr("rx", 5)
        .attr("fill", theme.colors.gray["500"])
        .attr

        .attr("x", STROKE_WIDTH)

        )

        .attr(

        )
        .attr("rx", 5)
        .attr

sel
        .attr("x", STROKE_WIDTH)
        .attr(

        )

        .attr(

sel
        .attr("x", STROKE_WIDTH)
        .attr(

          nodeRadius * 2 + edgeRadius * 2 - MARGIN_Y * 2 - STROKE_WIDTH * 2
        )
        .attr("width", svgWidth - STROKE_WIDTH * 2)
        .attr

sel
        .attr("x", STROKE_WIDTH)
        .attr(
          "height",
          nodeRadius * 2 + edgeRadius * 2 - MARGIN_Y * 2 - STROKE_WIDTH * 2
        )
        .attr

sel
        .append("rect")
        .attr("class", "overlay")
        .call(applyOverlay)
        .on("mouseover", function (d, i) {
          d3.select(this)
            .transition()
            .duration(parseInt(theme.transition.duration.normal))
            .attr("opacity", ".10")
        })
        .on("mouseout", function (d, i) {
          d3.select(this)
            .transition()
            .duration(parseInt(theme.transition.duration.normal))
            .attr("opacity", "0")
        })
        .on("mousedown", function (d, i) {
          d3.select(this)
            .transition()
            .duration(parseInt(theme.transition.duration.normal))
            .attr("opacity", ".20")
        })
        .on("mouseup", function (d, i) {
          d3.select(this)
            .transition()
            .duration(parseInt(theme.transition.duration.normal))
            .attr("opacity", ".10")
        })
        .on

text
          .attr("fill", "black")
          .text(({ id }) => `Fragment ${id}`)
          .attr("font-family", "inherit")
          .attr("text-anchor", "end")
          .attr("dy", ({ height }) => height + 12)
          .attr("dx", ({ width }) => width)
          .attr("fill", "black")
          .attr

text
          .attr("fill", "black")
          .text(({ id }) => `Fragment ${id}`)
          .attr("font-family", "inherit")
          .attr("text-anchor", "end")
          .attr("dy", ({ height }) => height + 12)
          .attr("dx", ({ width }) => width)
          .attr

text2
          .attr("fill", "black")
          .text(({ actorIds }) => `Actor ${actorIds.join(", ")}`)
          .attr("font-family", "inherit")
          .attr("text-anchor", "end")
          .attr("dy", ({ height }) => height + 24)
          .attr("dx", ({ width }) => width)
          .attr("fill", "black")
          .attr

text2
          .attr("fill", "black")
          .text(({ actorIds }) => `Actor ${actorIds.join(", ")}`)
          .attr("font-family", "inherit")
          .attr("text-anchor", "end")
          .attr("dy", ({ height }) => height + 24)
          .attr("dx", ({ width }) => width)
          .attr

boundingBox
          .on("mouseover", (event, { id }) => {
            // Remove existing tooltip if any
            d3.selectAll(".tooltip").remove()

            // Create new tooltip
            d3.select("body")
              .append("div")
              .attr("class", "tooltip")
              .style("position", "absolute")
              .style("background", "white")
              .style("padding", "10px")
              .style("border", "1px solid #ddd")
              .style("border-radius", "4px")
              .style("pointer-events", "none")
              .style("left", event.pageX + 10 + "px")
              .style("top", event.pageY + 10 + "px")
              .style("font-size", "12px")
              .html(getTooltipContent(id))
          })
          .on("mousemove", (event) => {
            d3.select(".tooltip")
              .style("left", event.pageX + 10 + "px")
              .style("top", event.pageY + 10 + "px")
          })
          .on

rect
        .attr("width", boxWidth)
        .attr("height", boxHeight)
        .attr("rx", 6) // rounded corners
        .attr("ry", 6)
        .attr("fill", "white")
        .attr("stroke", ({ id }) =>
          isSelected(id) ? theme.colors.blue["500"] : theme.colors.gray["200"]
        )
        .attr

circle
        .attr("cx", iconRadius + 10) // position circle in left part of box
        .attr("cy", boxHeight / 2)
        .attr("r", iconRadius)
        .attr

circle
        .attr("cx", iconRadius + 10) // position circle in left part of box
        .attr("cy", boxHeight / 2)
        .attr

circle
        .attr("cx", iconRadius + 10) // position circle in left part of box
        .attr

clipPath
        .select("rect")
        .attr("width", boxWidth - (iconRadius * 2 + 20)) // Leave space for icon
        .attr("height", boxHeight)
        .attr("x", iconRadius * 2 + 15)
        .attr

        .select("rect")
        .attr("width", boxWidth - (iconRadius * 2 + 20)) // Leave space for icon
        .attr("height", boxHeight)
        .attr

        .attr

typeText
        .attr("fill", "white")
        .text(({ relation }) => `${relationTypeAbbr(relation)}`)
        .attr("font-family", "inherit")
        .attr("text-anchor", "middle")
        .attr("x", iconRadius + 10)
        .attr("y", boxHeight / 2)
        .attr("dy", "0.35em") // vertical alignment
        .attr("font-size", 16)
        .attr

        .attr("dy", "0.35em")

g.on("mouseover", (event, { relation, id }) => {
        // Remove existing tooltip if any
        d3.selectAll(".tooltip").remove()

        // Create new tooltip
        d3.select("body")
          .append("div")
          .attr("class", "tooltip")
          .style("position", "absolute")
          .style("background", "white")
          .style("padding", "10px")
          .style("border", "1px solid #ddd")
          .style("border-radius", "4px")
          .style("pointer-events", "none")
          .style("left", event.pageX + 10 + "px")
          .style("top", event.pageY + 10 + "px")
          .style("font-size", "12px")
          .html(getTooltipContent(relation, id))
      })
        .on("mousemove", (event) => {

        })
